meaning: adj.装满的,负载的,苦恼的 vbl.lade的过去分词
examples: I came home laden with cardboard boxes.
When his boat was well-laden, the Mermaid would sink down into the sea, smiling at him.
The trees were laden with apples.
Even more than in Canada, in Japan projects like this are gravy-laden for the favored few.
Gesturing to a bag laden with boxes, he explains he has travelled all the way from Greece.
